title: Spicy Caribbean Jamaican Chinese Broccoli Tagine
description: A rich, savory, and slightly sweet stew inspired by the diverse flavors of the Caribbean, Jamaica, and China. Perfect for a cold evening or a midnight craving.

ingredients.name: sofrito
ingredients.notes: finely chopped onion, garlic, and bell pepper

instructions: In a small skillet, heat 1 tablespoon of coconut oil over medium heat.
Add the sofrito and cook, stirring occasionally, until softened and fragrant, about 5 minutes.
Add the scotch bonnet peppers, curry paste, ginger, allspice, cumin, and paprika. Cook, stirring constantly, for 1 minute.
Add the coconut oil and stir until melted.
Add the Chinese broccoli and cook, stirring occasionally, until tender, about 5 minutes.
Pour in the chicken broth and soy sauce. Stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a simmer.
Reduce heat to low and cook, covered, until the flavors have melded together and the broccoli is tender, about 15 minutes.
Stir in the lime juice and cilantro.
Serve immediately, garnished with additional cilantro if desired.
